title: fragaria pratensis
intro: Fragaria pratensis, also known as the wild strawberry or alpine strawberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and fruits of Fragaria pratensis have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and infections, due to their antibacterial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Fragaria pratensis, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to promote overall health and well-being, supporting digestive health, immune function, and skin health.
